title: AI Hasn’t Rebuilt the Organization Yet. Anxiety Rebuilt Management First
summary: AI may not have rebuilt organizations yet, but it has already amplified their instincts. In many teams, what speeds up first is not judgment, but the pressure to appear decisive — to show progress, compress cycles, and turn anxiety into management.
content: AI may not have rebuilt organizations yet, but it has already amplified their instincts. In many teams, what speeds up first is not judgment, but the pressure to appear decisive — to show progress, compress cycles, and turn anxiety into management.
